56024.title: Managing Asia
56024.description: A look at what it takes to transform a business to become greener and ensure a more sustainable future. Christine Tan talks to CEOs from four companies in the region, YTL PowerSeraya, TAL Apparel, Banpu Public Company and Alliance Global.
